creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
I made two fixes to the port's build framework, but I cannot seem to debug the initialization methods with gdb 7; however I'm not an objective-C programmer.

I do not know if the gazillions of +alloc warnings are relevant to your problem.

Anyways it does not look like the port would get to the point where it actually reads the LDAP configuration file.

Sorry, I cannot help beyond this point.
